title: Falling Chinese Crude Demand Puts Pressure On Tanker Demand But Post Summer Support Is Likely
section_path: Falling Chinese Crude Demand Puts Pressure On Tanker Demand But Post Summer Support Is Likely
section_path_text: Falling Chinese Crude Demand Puts Pressure On Tanker Demand But Post Summer Support Is Likely
summary:
Main
In this insight we provide an update on the current decline in crude tanker demand across the board. We drill down to identify the drivers of this as well as where crude tankers could find support in the latter half of 2023. By Dylan Simpson
As we move into the second half of 2023, overall crude tanker demand is slowing and trending slightly lower after a strong H1, particularly in the start of the second quarter of the year.
